raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W1W) Dropped in from wide draw, some headway final 200m, never dangerous.
(Lost right front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W1W) 自外檔出閘，移入內疊。最後二百米略為追前。從未能構成威脅。
（失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, difficult to settle throughout, weakened early in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，走外疊。沿途難以穩定走勢。直路早段轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Was slow away and settled last, failed to keep up with the field throughout, showed limited response when hard ridden final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘緩慢，居包尾位置。沿途未能跟上馬群。末段對力策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide behind midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, no cover on turn, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。中段搶口。直路彎沒有遮擋。直路初轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear, 2 away from the stands' rail, 6 lengths or so back at 400M, hard ridden 350M, failed to make any progress, finished last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;躍出時發生碰撞，居後列，走外欄第三疊。四百米處落後約六個馬位。三百五十米處受力策，但未能追前。包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W3W) 自外檔出閘後留後，落後約五個馬位，走第二疊。入直路時落後相同距離。直路早段未能望空，保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W2W3W) Drawn wide, held up last, pushed along from top of home straight, stayed on down the outside, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘，留居包尾位置。自直路初起受推策。在外疊保持走勢。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in last few, made up good ground in home straight to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居最後數位之內。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W4W) Prominent and wide early after beginning from the widest draw, gradually drifted over 3L back 3-wide 1000M out, gained 6th briefly in a similar position on top of home bend, faded into straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W4W) 自大外檔出閘，早段居前列，走外疊。一千米處逐漸墮退，落後逾三個馬位，走第三疊。直路初居相若位置，一度進佔第六位。入直路時力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W2W) Jumped awkwardly losing ground settling in midfield on rail after moderate start, came under pressure into home straight, ran on steadily but unable to peg back the winner throughout.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W2W) 出閘普通，笨拙及失地，其後居中間位置，走內欄。入直路時受催策，沿途以穩勢上前，但未能追上頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Jumped awkwardly from wide stall, quickly recovered to track leaders in wide position, ridden to challenge 200m out and every chance, winner too strong final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 自大外檔出閘笨拙，迅速恢復走勢，跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。二百米處受催策展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會，但最後一百米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置，落後約四個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前，居前列，走第二疊。入直路時落後四分三個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Moderately away from the widest draw, trapped very wide in midfield early, taken back after passing 1000M, raced at rear on the outside in the middle stages, made some progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 自大外檔出閘普通，早段居中間位置，走大外疊。跑過一千米處後留後。中段居後列，走外疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W4W4W) Sat midfield 3 wide, gave ground in the Straight. (Unacceptable Performance, must trial)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W4W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路上墮退。（表現難以接受，必須試閘及格。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Sat midfield 2 wide, held up in the Straight, never tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路上受困。從未能施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Moved straight to the rail behind runners from a wide draw shortly after the start, kept in a pocket until 100m, responded well when asked for an effort.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，其後不久在馬群之後迅速切入內欄。受困至一百米處，對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure to hold position final bend, switched for clear run 300m out, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W) 居中間位置。直路彎受催策以保持位置。三百米處轉換跑線以望空。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W4W5W6W) Sat worse than midfield 5 wide no cover, never a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W4W5W6W) 居中間之後位置，走第五疊，沒有遮擋。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Hampered at start, waited with in rear, keen early, driven along 400m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 起步時受阻礙，居後列，留力候上。早段搶口。四百米處受催策。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W3W) Raced close up, effort early in home straight, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W3W) 緊隨領先馬匹。直路初發力。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W2W2W2W) Sat on pace, slightly weakened passing the 150M, closed off okay (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W2W2W2W) 居前列。跑過一百五十米處時略為轉弱。衝刺尚可。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, pushed along 500m out to chase leader, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。五百米處受推策，追趕領放馬。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Jumped well and led, travelled keenly, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，取得領先，搶口。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W5W) Sat towards rear, switched out and pressed on rounding the Turn, stayed on nicely to grab 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W5W) 居後列。轉直路彎時向外移出，受催策。末段保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W1W3W) Out with rest, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 450M, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W1W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走內疊。四百五十米處向外移出。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W1W1W1W) Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W1W1W1W) 留居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後保持走內疊，略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W3W4W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時走大外疊。末段衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍。僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Waited with towards rear, under pressure 700m out, switched widest in home straight, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 居後列，留力候上。七百米處受催策。直路上移至最外疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W2W) Waited with towards rear, under pressure from 400m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居後列，留力候上。自四百米處起受催策。末段毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled towards rear, made some ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, 8 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後八個馬位。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, headway between horses from 250m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。自二百五十米處起在馬匹之間上前，保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W3W) Settled in mid-field, taken widest final bend, no extra final 150m and gave ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間位置。直路彎被帶出最外疊。最後一百五十米再無餘力及墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, under pressure 400m out, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。四百米處受催策。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W4W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居後列，走第二疊。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W2W) Settled midfield, traveled only fairly, minor progress made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W2W) 居中間位置，走勢僅屬一般。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W) Sat midfield 2 wide, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W4W3W) Raced wide in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W4W3W) 居後列，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W4W) Inconvenienced and taken wider in the first turn, sat 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield throughout, showed minor response over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W4W) 受妨礙，首次轉彎時被帶出較外疊。沿途居中間稍後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。末段對催策略有反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W2W2W) Raced 2 wide in 2nd position early. Weakened at 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W2W2W) 早段走二疊第二位。五十米力弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders, driven along to chase leaders 550m out, stayed on well in home straight, just lost third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 緊隨領先馬匹。五百五十米處受催策以追趕領先馬匹。直路上保持佳勢，僅失去季席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Tracked leader, nudged along from halfway, weakened quickly home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。自半程起受催策。直路上迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat at the rear, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居後列。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W3W) Sat handy, switched out approaching the Turn, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W3W) 居前列。趨近直路彎時向外移出。末段在催策下毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W4W) Tracked leader, forced wide and lost position bend, stayed on at the one pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W4W) 跟隨領放馬。直路彎被迫走外疊及失位。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position early in home straight, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘後被碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。直路早段難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W4W) Jumped only fairly, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後五至六個馬位，直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W3W) Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3-1/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後三又四分一個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W3W) Settled in mid-field, switched for clear run 300m out, tended to hang in final 200m, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居中間位置。三百米處轉換跑線以望空。最後二百米傾向內閃。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W2W3W) Jumped well from gate 10, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 自第十檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊。直路早段對催策略有反應。二百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W3W3W) Tracked leaders, headway final bend to chase leaders, quickened early in home straight and soon in command, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W3W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎上前追趕領先馬匹。直路初加速，瞬即控制大局。末段領先距離收窄，但一直保持佳勢，穩操勝券。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Bumped shortly after leaving stall, pushed along to press leader, struggled to hold position on bend, weakened 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 出閘後不久發生碰撞。受推策，追迫領放馬。直路彎難以保持位置。三百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Bumped on jumping, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover from 1000M, moved closer on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 躍出時被碰撞，居中間稍前位置，走外疊。自一千米處起沒有遮擋。直路彎追近。耗力太多，直路初轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W3W3W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced very wide throughout, improved to track pace out wide without cover 1500m out, effort 500m out, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W3W3W3W) 起步後不久被碰撞，沿途走大外疊。千五米處上前跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受催策。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W2W4W) Began only fairly from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W2W4W) 自外檔出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W1W2W) Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W1W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Sat worse than midfield on the rail, picked off a few weakened rivals. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。末段超越數匹已轉弱的對手。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W3W4W) Driven along and outpaced early stages, in rear after forced to steady 1500m out, taken widest into home straight, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W3W4W) 早段受催策，但未能跟上步速。千五米處被迫收慢，其後居後列。入直路時移出最外疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W2W2W4W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider after passing 450M, 4-1/2L back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W2W2W4W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。跑過四百五十米處後走更外疊。入直路時落後四個半馬位。末段衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列，走外疊。入直路時落後半個馬位。直路早段保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Clean jump, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘俐落，受催策上前居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段對催策反應平平，最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Showed speed to get across, kicked top of home straight, headed 200m out and weakened quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 展現前速，切入內疊。直路初加速。二百米處被超越及迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (4W1W1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Mucus in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(4W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前領先。直路彎受對手挑戰。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有痰。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W3W) Heavily bumped out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 700m out, driven 400m out, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 出閘時被大力碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處移離內欄。四百米處受催策。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, showed good speed to lead, joined by rivals top of home straight, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 躍出時發生碰撞。展現甚快前速，領放。直路初被對手追上，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, peaked on run 500M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。五百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W3W2W) Crowded start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W3W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路早段追前甚多。一百米處未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (3W2W2W4W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(3W2W2W4W) 自外檔出閘後留後，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前頗多，跑獲季軍，對頭兩名馬匹未能構成威脅。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, a bit closer on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。自五百五十米處起走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。直路上保持佳勢，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W4W2W2W) Raced wide, improved to press leader 1100m out, unable to hold position 400m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W4W2W2W) 走外疊。千一米處推進以追迫領放馬。四百米處未能保持位置。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W4W5W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W4W5W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W3W3W3W) Blundered shortly after start, tracked leaders on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W3W3W3W) 起步後不久失蹄，跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。入直路時挑戰領放馬。直路初取得領先。七十五米處未能再增速及被超越，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began well, sat 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Commenced well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走勢輕鬆。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Crowded start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, moved closer turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間稍前位置，走外疊。入直路時追近。三百米處取得領先。末段保持佳勢，但過終點時不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W4W) Tracked leaders, taken wider final bend, wide into home straight, driven 400m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎移出較外疊。入直路時走外疊。四百米處受催策。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (5W3W3W4W) Shifted out on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, kept on well until crowded close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(5W3W3W4W) 躍出時向外斜跑，居中間稍前位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走較外疊。保持佳勢，直至接近終點時受擠迫。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to chase leader, challenged leader 400m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘後受催策以追趕領放馬。四百米處挑戰領放馬。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W1W) Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, headed near 500M, 2nd turning in, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放，領先一個馬位。接近五百米處時被超越。入直路時居第二位。一百五十米處再次領先。保持佳勢，但接近終點時不敵頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, kept on well until approaching final 50M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一個半馬位，走內疊。直路彎居相同位置。保持佳勢至趨近最後五十米，其後轉弱。

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Held up in last pair, no impression under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 留居最後兩位之內。在催策下毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W1W1W) Mid-field, headway from 400m out, still fourth 100m out, stayed on strongly to edge ahead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W1W1W) 居中間位置。自四百米處起上前，一百米處仍居第四位。保持勁勢，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W1W) Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，落後三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Mid-field, pushed along 400m out, unable to quicken, stayed on late, no threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。四百米處受推策，未能加速。末段保持走勢，未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W) Held up early, headway into mid-field past halfway, rail run into home straight, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 早段留後。跑過半程後追前至中間位置。入直路時走內欄。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 自第十二檔出閘後留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上超越部分已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Raced outside of leader, unable to quicken with that rival 300m out, stuck to task, stayed on closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 居領放馬外側。三百米處未能與領放馬一同加速。末段在力拼下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Made contact at start, raced better than midfield but trapped wide early, sent forward after passing 700M, took the lead 600M, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時發生觸碰，早段居中間之前位置，走外疊。跑過七百米處後受催策上前。六百米處取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但接近終點時未能抗衡頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W) Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W3W) Travelled wide throughout after beginning from a wide barrier, improved steadily from towards rear to reach 2L 4th in back straight 800M out, drifted wider into straight and soon weakened out of contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W3W) 自外檔出閘後沿途走外疊。自後列穩步上前，八百米處在對面直路上進佔第四位，落後兩個馬位。入直路時移出較外疊。瞬即轉弱，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (4W1W1W) Sat just behind the leaders, kept on nicely, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(4W1W1W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置。保持佳勢，險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W1W) Disputed lead, led outright and pressed on halfway, headed only late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W1W) 爭奪領先位置。半程時單騎領放及受催策。僅於末段僅被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Jumped nicely and sent forward to lead, kept on nicely for 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Star Witness from Impulsive Dream, a daughter of Encosta de Lago. Horses by the same sire include Aurora Lady and Bright Inheritance. This fellow was given five trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished seventh under pressure, beaten by 10Ls, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on June 26. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「重要證人」(Star Witness)之後，在港同父馬包括「晨曦儷人」及「光明傳承」等駒，生母出自「拿高」(Encosta de Lago)。抵港後試閘五次。最近6月26日出試從化草地1000米，早段居中，末段力策下跑第七名，落後頭馬十個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, no clear run until 200M, ran on well afterwards.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。未能望空直至二百米處，其後以佳勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Mid-field, stayed on well for pressure final 300m, unable to reach winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置。最後三百米在催策下保持佳勢，但未能追及頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W2W) In rear, still plenty to do top of home straight, short of room when trying to improve 300m out, stayed on well once clear final 200m, unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W2W) 居後列。直路初仍落後甚遠。三百米處在嘗試推進時空位不足。最後二百米望空後保持佳勢，但未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W3W) Broke well before settling towards rear in 8th or 9th, ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W3W) 出閘迅速，其後居後列第八或第九位。直路上受催策上前。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Settled behind midfield on the rail, stayed on well along the inside.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。沿內疊保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (3W2W2W) Mid-division, headway through field top of home straight, chased winner home from 200m out, gaining at line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(3W2W2W) 居中間位置。直路初在馬群中穿插上前。自二百米處起追趕頭馬，過終點時仍在追近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Obtained a 3-wide spot in mid-division, 4Ls to make up 400M, stayed on moderately until 100M then found no extra final stages. (Jockey - may not have run out 1400M / No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。四百米處落後四個馬位。保持普通走勢直至一百米處，末段再無餘力。（騎師表示，坐騎或未能應付是仗的千四米途程。賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Tracked leaders, well placed into home straight, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, gave ground quickly final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時居好位。自四百米處起在催策下未能加速。最後一百五十米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Tracked pace, hampered and taken wider 600m out, dropped away quickly 300m out, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。六百米處受阻礙，被帶出較外疊。三百米處迅速墮退。遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field, bumped 1000m out, under pressure on bend to chase leaders, left behind home straight, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。一千米處發生碰撞。直路彎在催策下追趕領先馬匹。直路上被拋離，所負甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Taken back from the outside barrier, sat towards the rear on the rail, made minor headway late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，留居後列，走內欄。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W3W) Sat at the rear on the rail, picked off a few weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W3W) 居後列，走內欄。末段超越數匹已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Settled on the rail just off the speed, threw his head about in the middle stages, lacked a finish effort over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居領放馬稍後位置，走內欄。中段搶口。末段衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W2W) Settled midfield, held up at the Turn, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W2W) 居中間位置。直路彎受困。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 350M, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。三百五十米處向外移出。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W2W3W) Towards rear, headway 400m out, stayed on home straight despite tending to hang right, fared best of those coming from off pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W2W3W) 居後列。四百米處追前。儘管在直路上傾向內閃，但保持走勢。在後上馬匹中表現最佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。四百米處順勢上前挑戰。未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, 3 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。早段及中段難以穩定走勢。入直路時走第三疊。直路初對催策略有反應。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Sent forward to be prominent 3 wide, kept on only fairly. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 受催策上前，居前列，走第三疊。末段僅能保持一般走勢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Jumped well from gate 12, raced prominently on the outside, slightly taken back after passing 1200M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 自第十二檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。跑過千二米處後稍為留後，走第二疊。中段落後兩個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W4W5W) Jumped awkwardly and then checked briefly, in rear, very wide and pushed along turning into home straight, no response.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W4W5W) 出閘笨拙，其後一度勒避，居後列，走大外疊。轉入直路時受推策，毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (3W4W) Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, under pressure from the 550M, gave ground soon after.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第三疊。自五百五十米處起受催策，其後瞬即墮退。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 跟隨領放馬，走第二疊。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W1W1W) Sat last 2 wide, failed to make progress in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W1W1W) 居包尾位置，走第二疊。直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Began well from gate 1, took the early lead, headed 950M, 2nd in the middle stages, hard ridden from 200M, retook the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，早段取得領先。九百五十米處被超越，中段居第二位。自二百米處起受力策，一百五十米處再次取得領先。保持佳勢，但末段不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (6W1W1W) Involved in early battle for lead, led outright after 450m, responded to pressure from 300m out, challenged 100m out, winner too strong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(6W1W1W) 早段爭奪領先，跑了四百五十米後單騎領放。自三百米處起對催策交出反應。一百米處受挑戰。未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W2W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W2W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居包尾位置。轉入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Jumped moderately from the wideset barrier and soon taken well back, commenced move inside the 600M racing 3-wide rounding home bend, obtained a clear run just inside the 200M, ran on well without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 自最外檔出閘普通，瞬即留居遙遙落後的位置。六百米處開始上前，轉直路彎時走第三疊。跑過二百米處後望空。以佳勢追前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden from 300M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時與對手互相碰撞，落後領放馬兩個馬位，靠近外欄競跑。自三百米處起受力策。衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) Tracked leaders early stages, dropped to race in touch with leaders 700m out, checked 300m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 早段緊隨領先馬匹。七百米處墮後，仍跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處勒避。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Tracked pace, well placed into home straight, challenged and every chance from 300m out, one paced and unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。入直路時居好位。自三百米處起展開挑戰，一度極具爭勝機會。末段保持同速，未能追上三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W3W) Sat last, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W3W) 居包尾位置。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W) Sat last, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W) 居尾列。未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Tracked pace, ridden to hold position from 400m out, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。自四百米處起在催策下保持位置。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Towards rear, stayed on inside rail, unable to pick up for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，固守內欄。受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Crowded in rear of midfield on first bend dropping to last few, remained in similar rear position near the rail entering home straight, made modest progress behind runners.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，受擠迫。轉首個彎位時墮居最後數位之內。入直路時仍居相若的後列位置，靠近內欄競跑。在馬群之後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Sat behind midfield 2 wide, raced greenly, never impress. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊，走勢稚嫩。毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Jumped only fairly, settled down in midfield 3-4Ls back, failed to pick up pace in the straight. No threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，落後三至四個馬位。直路上未能加速。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W) Settled midfield, no clear run at the early Straight, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間位置。直路初未能望空。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Ridden to soon recover from moderate start to 5th within 3L of pace, drifted over 4L back when tempo increased at about 800M, slightly further back in 6th 500M out, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘普通，受催策，瞬即恢復走勢，居第五位，落後領放馬不逾三個馬位。約八百米處步速加快時墮退，落後逾四個馬位。五百米處略為墮居第六位。直路上持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Towards rear on rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, just over 4L back into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程。入直路時落後稍逾四個馬位。持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Crowded soon after start, recovered to take up mid-field position, headway 200m out, flattened out final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 起步後瞬即受擠迫，其後恢復走勢，居中間位置。二百米處上前。最後五十米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly losing ground, soon recovered to 10th on rail and then 9th 800M out, saved ground turning in for home, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，瞬即恢復走勢，居第十位，走內欄。八百米處居第九位。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。在催策下以穩勢上前，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W) Moderately away from gate 9, taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer after passing 450M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W) 自第九檔出閘普通，留居後列，走第二疊。跑過四百五十米處後略為追近。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (7W2W2W) Wide early from high draw, taken forward to press leader by halfway, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(7W2W2W) 自第十檔出閘，早段走外疊。半程前受催策上前以追迫領放馬。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (6W2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, shared lead turning in, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(6W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。入直路時並排領先。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Broke well from a wide barrier, obtained rails run in front 1000M out setting a steady pace, kicked some 2L clear on straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 100M and collared close to home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，切入內欄，一千米處取得領先，以平穩步速領放。入直路時加速帶離約兩個馬位，但最後一百米後勁不繼，接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to track leader, under pressure to chase leader 450m out, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W2W2W) 出閘後受催策，跟隨領放馬。四百五十米處在催策下追趕領放馬。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W3W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, followed winner through 300m out, unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。三百米處跟隨頭馬上前，但未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began smartly, sat a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，落後領放馬一個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前帶頭。入直路時領先四分三馬位。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, weakened gradually in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下取得領先。直路上逐漸轉弱。

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat towards rear, failed to respond when asked, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列。對催策毫無反應。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W4W5W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, started a run from the 600M, taken wider on the Home Turn, weakened final furlong. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W4W5W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。自六百米處起開始發力。直路彎移出更外疊。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W2W4W) Mid-field, forward move wide final bend, picked up strongly final 200m, led on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置。直路彎發力上前，走外疊。最後二百米加速強勁。過終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Dropped in from wide draw, started to make up ground 300m out, stayed on into third final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，向內移入。三百米處開始上前。最後五十米保持走勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped on terms and settled on the leader's back on the rail, switched towards the middle part of the track final stages and stayed on fairly well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居領放馬之後，走內欄。末段移至跑道中央位置，保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Sat behind midfield, traveled fairly, could not be quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走勢一般。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W3W) Waited with towards rear, checked 500m out, no impression under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居後列，留力候上。五百米處勒避。末段在催策下毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W3W) Raced 2 wide behind midfield early. Pushed forward at 950M. Made progress on the outside in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 早段於馬群中間之後二疊位置競跑。九百五十米催策上前。直路上沿跑道外側上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W3W) Settled behind midfield, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間之後位置。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Waited with in rear, dropped to last place 750m out and soon ridden, passed a few tiring rivals in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。七百五十米處墮居包尾位置，瞬即受催策。直路上超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled well behind from the widest barrier, came under pressure to challenge just inside the 400m saving ground on rail turning in for home, ran on under pressure despite interrupted runs in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後遙居於後。跑過四百米處後在催策下展開挑戰。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。直路上儘管受阻礙，但在催策下上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off well to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約五個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。衝刺良佳，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Well there early before taken over 3L back in 5th on rail, lost position when tempo increased over 800M out, saved ground turning in for home but soon weakened in straight.
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 早段居好位，其後留居第五位，落後逾三個馬位，走內欄。八百米處在步速加快之際失位。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程，但直路上瞬即轉弱。
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W5W) Held up, plenty to do when pushed along 400m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W5W) 留後。四百米處受推策時落後甚遠。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W2W) Taken back from the outside gate, settled midfield on the rail, closed off without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留後，居中間位置，走內欄。末段展開衝刺，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Sluggish early despite ridden along, improved steadily on rail to reach midfield 1200M out, switched for a clear run over 200M out and quickened well to snatch victory final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 儘管受催策，但早段走勢遲緩。沿欄穩步上前，千二米處進佔中間位置。二百米處轉換跑線以望空。以佳勢加速，最後數步取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W5W) Settled midfield, traveled okay, made some progress when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W5W) 居中間位置，走勢不俗。在催策下略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W5W) Sat midfield 3 wide, showed some dash top of the Straight and kept on to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路初略為加速上前，保持走勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (3W2W2W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider from 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(3W2W2W3W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。自五百米處起走更外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。衝刺凌厲，跑獲亞軍。僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat against the fence midfield, briefly blocked for a run, stayed on ok, something further would suit.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。一度受困而未能望空。末段保持尚可走勢。增程角逐或更合發揮。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W2W) Sat midfield, traveled okay, one pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居中間位置，走勢尚可。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W2W3W) Mid-field, forced wide and tight for room turning into home straight, again short of room 200m out, one paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時被迫走外疊，受緊迫。二百米處再度空位不足。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, held up between 300M and 200M, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。三百米處至二百米處之間受困。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W4W) Tracked pace, wide into home straight, stayed on, not beaten far but unable to reach leader.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W4W) 跟隨領放馬。入直路時走外疊。保持走勢，所負不遠，但未能追及領放馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W1W1W1W) Tracked leading pair, angled off rail over 300m out, stayed on, lacked pace to trouble winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先兩駒。三百米處移離內欄。保持走勢，但速度不足以威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W5W) Was slow into stride and settled at the back division, forced slightly wider turning for home, made some minor progress in the end.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W5W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。轉直路彎時被迫略為移出更外疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W4W) Raced in last place after slow start, passed a few late on, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W4W) 出閘緩慢，其後居包尾位置。末段超越數駒。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W4W3W) Sat rear, raced rear, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W4W3W) 沿途居包尾位置。對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W2W) Raced rear, made minor progress under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W2W) 居後列。在鞭策下略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W1W1W1W) Sat rear, traveled smoothly, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W1W1W1W) 居後列，走勢暢順。在催策下毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slowly away, chased along to take up position in mid-field, strong run under hands and heels to lead 75m out, won readily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，追趕對手，進佔中間位置。在騎師手足並用催策下走勢強勁，七十五米處取得領先。從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W4W) Sat last, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W4W) 居包尾位置。未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W2W2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 550M, made good progress in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W2W2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。自五百五十米處起走第三疊。直路上追前頗多，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W3W3W) Mid-field, wide final bend, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居中間位置。入直路時走外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Pressed forward from a poor draw to be prominent and wide without cover home bend, folded up quickly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前，居前列。直路彎走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W2W2W) Sat on pace, angled out from 1500M and led passing 1200M, gave ground quickly in the Straight (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W2W2W) 居前列。自千五米處起向外移出，跑過千二米處時帶頭。直路上迅速墮退。（表現令人失望。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 550M, took the lead 300M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。五百五十米處向外移出。三百米處取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W2W) Wide early, taken forward and raced prominently, ridden to lead 200m out, stayed on well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 早段走外疊，受催策上前，居前列。二百米處在催策下取得領先。保持佳勢，保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W4W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 650M, closer on turn, kept on well in straight but always just held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。自六百五十米處起走第三疊。直路彎追近。直路上保持佳勢，但一直以些微距離落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W4W4W) Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, moved closer after passing 750M, 3 wide turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, peaked and headed 50M, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W4W4W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過七百五十米處後追近。入直路時走第三疊。直路上對催策反應良佳，一百五十米處取得領先。五十米處未能再增速及被超越。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W3W) Tracked leader, weakened from top of home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。自直路初起轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內欄。沿途走內欄節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速，最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W2W2W3W) Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W2W2W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居後列，走第二疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W3W) From wide draw taken back to last, pressed along home turn and had 7Ls to make up on leader 400M, took time to get going and commenced to finish off well final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W3W) 自外檔出閘，留居包尾位置。直路彎受催策。四百米處落後領放馬七個馬位。加速需時。最後二百米開始以不俗走勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W3W) Crowded on jumping, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W3W) 躍出時受擠迫，沿途居後列，從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W3W4W) Taken back from the widest draw settling 3-wide in last few, came under pressure to hold place rounding home bend but dropped to the last leaving the 600M, ran on past well-beaten horses closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘，留居後列，走第三疊。轉直路彎時受催策以保持位置，但於跑離六百米處時墮居包尾位置。末段超越已洩氣潰敗的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, travelled keenly in the early and middle stages, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居包尾位置，落後八個馬位。早段及中段搶口。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (3W4W) Caught racing wide no cover in midfield, moved up 600M to be tracking the pace turning into straight, kept on steadily to go 2nd mid-straight, no match for the runaway winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(3W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。六百米處上前，轉入直路時跟隨領放馬。保持穩勢，直路中段進佔第二位，但不敵遙遙領先的頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W3W) Bumped shortly after start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out approaching 450M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內疊。趨近四百五十米處時向外移出。直路上對催策反應甚佳，二百米處取得領先，保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, effort entering home straight, unable to challenge winner but stuck to task for clear second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時發力。未能挑戰頭馬，但持續力拼，帶離餘駒跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W4W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, improved after passing 800M, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W4W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過八百米處後推進。入直路時挑戰領放馬。直路上保持佳勢，獲得亞軍，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W3W5W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W3W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走外疊。轉入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W3W2W5W) Began only fairly, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 2 wide after entering the back straight, commenced move 600M, 7 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W3W2W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。進入對面直路後走第二疊。六百米處開始上前。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W3W4W4W) Sat 4 wide worse than midfield, closed off okay. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W3W4W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第四疊。末段衝刺不俗。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W3W) Sat rear, traveled fairly, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居後列，走勢一般。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Raced in rear, under pressure 450m out, some headway up rail in home straight, unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列。四百五十米處受催策。直路上沿欄略為追前。未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W2W3W) Mid-field, wide turning into home straight, stayed on for pressure but lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時走外疊。末段在催策下保持走勢，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W1W1W) Settled towards rear, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W1W1W) 居後列，走勢普通。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Tracked pace, stuck to inside, stayed on under pressure, not beaten far in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，固守內疊。在催策下保持走勢。在多駒幾乎齊過終點下所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W4W6W) Sat worse than midfield 3 wide, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W4W6W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled at the back from the widest barrier, ran past a couple of beaten horses closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後居後列。末段超越一對已洩氣潰敗的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, took the lead 200M, kept on very well to the line, won by 2Ls. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。二百米處取得領先，保持甚佳走勢至終點，以兩個馬位之先勝出賽事。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W3W2W) Sat last, made some minor late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W3W2W) 居包尾位置。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Jumped nicely from draw 3, allowed to find his feet early stages and settled down in midfield, stayed on mildly final 400M to claim 4th near line without threatening top three.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 自第三檔出閘良佳，早段獲許順其自然地競跑，居中間位置。最後四百米保持一般走勢，接近終點時進佔第四位，但未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Settled wide in midfield dropping to last few rounding home bend, widest runner into straight, made no impression under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走外疊。轉直路彎時墮居最後數位。入直路時走最外疊。在催策下毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Settled worse than midfield, checked and lost its running near the 250M, not much found thereafter (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。接近二百五十米處時勒避，失去跑線，其後無甚餘力。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Settled in last few from a poor draw, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 自第十檔出閘，居最後數位之內。從未看似有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W) Taken well behind from the widest draw and waited with, remained in last into straight, baulked for a run over 200M out, finished off the race well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W) 自大外檔出閘後留居遙遙落後的位置，留力候上。入直路時仍居包尾位置。二百米處受困，末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W2W) Settled midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居中間位置，走勢不俗。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Slightly slow out and crowded, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7-1/2L back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘稍慢及受擠迫，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後七個半馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W3W) Not the best away, mid-field, forward move out wide from halfway and upsides leader final bend, led 200m out, kept going but winner too strong final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 出閘並非最快，居中間位置。自半程起上前，走外疊。直路彎上前追逼領放馬。二百米處取得領先。保持走勢，但最後五十米不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W2W) Waited with in rear, under pressure to maintain position from over 500m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W2W) 居後列，留力候上。自五百米處起受催策以保持位置，未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in last few on rail, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居最後數位之內，走內欄。從未看似具爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, slightly weakened over the concluding stages (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 在催策下帶頭，走勢不俗。末段略為轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W4W) Raced in touch with leaders, wide into home straight, kept going but lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時走外疊。保持走勢，但未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W3W) Sat just behind the leaders, travelled nicely at the top of the Straight, just one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置。直路初走勢良佳，在催策下僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W1W1W) Sat midfield, traveled reasonably well, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走勢不俗。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Stumbled leaving stalls then squeezed out, good headway up inside rail over 300m out, unable to sustain and lost ground final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘時失蹄，其後受擠迫。三百米處沿欄追前甚多。最後一百米後繼無力及失地。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W4W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, dropped to midfield after entering the back straight, 3 wide after passing 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W4W) 與對手同步出閘，早段居中間之前位置，走第二疊。進入對面直路後墮居中間位置。跑過九百米處後走第三疊。轉入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初未能再加速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Bumped start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分一個馬位。直路早段未能再增速及被超越。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Led on the rail, traveled smoothly, shifted out under pressure, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 沿欄領放，走勢暢順。在催策下向外斜跑，已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat in front of midfield, lay in in the Home Straight, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置。直路上內閃。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Sat behind the lead, traveled strongly, kept on well to win.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬之後，走勢強勁。保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, hard ridden from 400M, struck the running rail 300m becoming unbalanced, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘俐落，受催策上前，取得領先。直路彎前走勢良佳。自四百米處起受力策。三百米處踢中內欄，失去平衡。保持佳勢，但最後七十五米未能抗衡頭馬。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, took the lead approaching 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎位置相同。趨近二百米處時取得領先。保持佳勢，但終點線上未能抗衡頭馬。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked pace. Hung briefly when driven 400m out but stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。四百米處受催策時一度斜閃，但保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Ridden along to lead, weakened inside 150M, failed to respond (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 在催策下領放。最後一百五十米轉弱，對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, keen middle stages, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 沿欄跟隨領先馬匹。中段搶口。未能望空直至二百米處。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, tight of room 150m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。入直路時須等待空位出現。一百五十米處空位不足。保持走勢，但速度不足以追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W3W) Settled in midfield, lost ground when wideset into straight, ran about and a difficult ride early in straight, baulked for a run inside the 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間位置。入直路時走最外疊之際失地。直路初斜跑，難以催策。最後一百米受阻。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W2W2W) Away with them, raced in 2nd, 3/4L back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居第二位。入直路時落後四分三個馬位。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped only fairly, chased leaders 2-wide, kept going well turning home, no match for winner's acceleration, went 2nd briefly near 150M but couldn't hold off runner up late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，追趕領先馬匹，走第二疊。轉直路彎時保持佳勢，但加速力不及頭馬。接近一百五十米處時一度進佔第二位，但末段未能抗衡亞軍馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W3W4W) Settled in last few, commenced move 3-wide at the 600M and the widest into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish despite hanging in and a difficult ride.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W3W4W) 居最後數位之內。自六百米處起開始上前，走第三疊。入直路時走最外疊。走勢良佳，雖然內閃及難以被策騎，但過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Settled well back from a wide barrier, keen when tempo slackened approaching first bend, snuck closer to within 5L of pace on rail in 11th into straight, ran on without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後遙居於後。趨近首個彎位時在步速減慢之際搶口。入直路時沿欄追近至第十一位，落後領放馬不逾五個馬位。末段追前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W2W) Broke well before settling in rear of midfield, became worse in 8th rounding home bend, ran on well under pressure near the centre of the track to claim 3rd closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置。轉直路彎時居後列第八位。末段靠近跑道中央競跑，在催策下以佳勢上前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W) Settled just worse than midfield, ran on steadily inside final 250M but without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W) 居中間稍後位置。最後二百五十米以穩勢追前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Close up on rail early, carried backward losing a couple of lengths onto first turn, midfield rounding home bend but snuck back up after straightening, making good ground when running into heels and checked 150M out, never recovered.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 早段跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。開始轉首個彎位時墮後數個馬位。轉直路彎時居中間位置。入直路後再次上前，追前甚多，一百五十米處靠近對手後蹄時勒避，其後從未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, stayed on well final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處順勢上前展開挑戰。最後三百米保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position, tracked pace, ridden 400m out, one paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。四百米處受催策。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Settled rear, traveled okay, made steady ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列，走勢不俗。末段以穩勢追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W2W2W3W) Waited with, under pressure in rear turning into home straight, strong run on wide outside final 150m, led close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W2W2W3W) 留力候上。轉入直路時居後列，受催策。最後一百五十米在外疊走勢強勁。接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W3W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, under pressure from the 450M, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。自四百五十米處起受催策。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, made minor ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W3W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure 500m out to chase leaders, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居中間位置。五百米處受催策，追趕領先馬匹。最後二百米以佳勢上前，追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Settled in rear of midfield, in similar position into straight, ran home one-paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時位置相若。在催策下保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Dropped in from widest draw and raced in last place, headway amongst horses from 200m out, stayed on well, still gaining on winner at line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後切入，居包尾位置。自二百米處起在馬匹之間追前。保持佳勢。過終點時仍在追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(-) (1W1W1W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, pushed along final bend, switched for clear run top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(-)(1W1W1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎受推策。直路初轉換跑線以望空。其後在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Waited with towards rear, clear run up rail from 300m out, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。自三百米處起沿欄望空。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Raced in rear, driven along 400m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列。四百米處受催策。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Outpaced early, in rear, pushed along halfway, in last pair entering home straight, stayed on well final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 早段未能跟上步速，居後列。半程時受推策。入直路時仍居最後兩名之內。最後一百五十米保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on outer, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 自大外檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W4W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide in midfield, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W4W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 350M, 3 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。三百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W2W) Sat outside the leader, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W5W) Raced very widest without cover throughout, some headway on bend, lost touch final 300m, left behind.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W5W) 沿途走大外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎略為追前。最後三百米未能跟上對手，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Settled behind midfield 6Ls back, only battled home final 400M and was safely held by leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置，落後六個馬位。最後四百米僅能勉力而為，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W) Raced wide in rear, improved to track pace out wide without cover 900m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W) 居後列，走外疊。推進以跟隨領放馬，九百米處走外疊，沒有遮擋。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 500M, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 自最外檔出閘後留居後列，走第二疊。五百米處向外移出。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 自第十三檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W5W) Sat towards rear, raced wide, gave ground quickly in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W5W) 居後列，走外疊。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W3W4W) In rear, pushed along and wide turning into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W3W4W) 居後列。轉入直路時受推策，走外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (4W3W3W4W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, had trouble finding clear running early in the Straight, stayed on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(4W3W3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路初未能望空。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Wide in mid-division, lost place turning into home straight, soon well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊。轉入直路時失位，瞬即遙遙落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W1W) From wide draw taken across behind runners, settled near last about 5Ls back, lacked a finishing response in the straight. Never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W1W) 自外檔出閘，在馬群之後切入，居接近包尾位置，落後約五個馬位。直路上受催策，但衝刺乏力。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W4W) Sat worse than midfield, traveled greenly, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W4W) 居中間之後位置。走勢稚嫩。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled down behind midfield 5-6Ls back, little change in position to the straight, didn't respond to riding from 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，落後五至六個馬位。直路前居相若位置。自四百米處起對催策毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W2W) Jumped ok, sat midfield one off the rail, hit the line strongly when asked, just missed by a whisker.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W2W) 出閘尚可，居中間位置，走第二疊。在催策下衝刺強勁，僅以短馬頭位之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Began well from a middle draw, settled down 2-wide in midfield, lay in when placed under pressure in the home straight, ran to the line steadily for 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 自第七檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路上在催策下內閃。末段以穩勢上前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, driven 500m out, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, stayed on but unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。五百米處受催策。未能望空直至一百五十米處。保持走勢，但未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) A bit outpaced early and raced in last place, short of room when trying to improve 300m out, switched and ran on final 250m, unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 早段略為未能跟上步速，居包尾位置。三百米處在嘗試推進時空位不足。最後二百五十米轉換跑線及追前，未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 10, raced behind midfield on outer, 5 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 自第十檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Broke well before settling in 6th in midfield, only produced moderate progress under pressure inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間第六位。最後二百米在催策下僅能略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Keen in mid-field, angled wide to make effort 300m out, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 中段搶口。三百米處移出外疊以發力，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W4W) Jumped only fairly, sat midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, minor progress made (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置。轉直路彎時向外移出。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, driven along 600m out, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。六百米處受催策。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Moderately away, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, kept on well to take a place without threatening the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，落後領放馬三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空。跑過三百米處後望空。保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W4W) Settled midfield, gave ground quickly in the Straight (Must BT, See Incident Report).
(Irregular heart rhythm and blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Irregular heart rhythm and blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置。直路上迅速墮退。（必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）
（心律不正常及氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W1W2W4W) Jumped only fairly, sat rear, pressed on passing 500M, switched out, responded reasonably well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W1W2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居包尾位置。跑過五百米處時受催策。其後向外移出，在催策下反應不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, ran out of room final 200m, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘，墮後。直路彎受推策，追趕領先馬匹。最後二百米空位不足，未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W3W) Tracked leader, pushed along over 400m out, soon lost position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。四百米處受推策，其後瞬即失位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W3W3W) Wide throughout, raced close up and keen, upsides leaders turning into home straight, faded final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W3W3W) 沿途走外疊，緊隨領先馬匹，搶口。轉入直路時上前追迫領先馬匹。最後一百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W3W4W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, made some headway from the 500M, gave ground final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。自五百米處起略為追前。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W3W) Sat towards rear, not much impression made, raced flat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 居後列。無甚表現，走勢平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Settled worse than midfield, raced keenly, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 居中間之後位置。搶口。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) From wide draw taken back to last, had 7-8Ls to make up on leader 400M, couldn't improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，留居包尾位置。四百米處落後領放馬七至八個馬位。未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Towards rear most of the way to home straight, saved ground on rail turning in, made no further impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 直路前大部分途程居後列。入直路時走內欄節省腳程。直路上再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Dropped back to the rear with the speed underneath, severely checked near the 900M and soon got slightly detached from the field, swung home the widest, made no impression in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 在賽事步速甚快下墮居後列。接近九百米處時大力勒避，瞬即被馬群稍為拋離。直路彎走最外疊。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) In rear after sluggish start, still in rear top of home straight, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步緩慢，居尾列。直路初仍居後列。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W1W) Tracked leaders, struggled to hold position from 700m out, severely checked 500m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自七百米處起難以保持位置。五百米處大力勒避，未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W2W) Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W2W) 沿途遙居於後。從未看似有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Waited with in rear, keen middle stages, checked 700m out, outpaced final bend, left behind home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。中段搶口。七百米處勒避。直路彎未能跟上步速。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Awkward start and lost ground, held up last, driven along and outpaced middle stages, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，留居包尾位置。中段受催策，但未能跟上步速。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W4W) Jumped on terms, dropped back to race in midfield, came under pressure 500M and couldn't go on leaving 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，墮居中間位置。五百米處受催策。跑離三百米處時無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W3W4W) Wide in mid-field, forward move 500m out, unable to sustain, weakened home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W3W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊。五百米處上前，其後無以為繼，直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W4W) Mid-field, headway out wide final bend, chased leaders 200m out, flattened out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 居中間位置。直路彎上前，走外疊。二百米處追趕領先馬匹。末段洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W2W) Raced in last pair, still plenty to do final bend, stayed on into mid-field, no threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W2W) 居最後兩位之內。直路彎仍落後甚遠。保持走勢，進佔中間位置。未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Sluggish start and lost ground, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，失地。直路初仍居包尾位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W4W) Not the cleanest away and sat near the rear, overracing early stages, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W4W) 出閘欠俐落，居後列。早段搶口。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般及發生觸碰，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無表現。
