raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Missed the start, sat midfield 3 wide, gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 漏閘，居中間位置，走第三疊。直路上墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分三個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但接近終點時不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，在催策下上前領放。入直路時領先一又四分三馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, took the lead near 150M, kept on well but could not hold off the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W3W) 居前列，走第二疊。接近一百五十米處時取得領先。保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Unbalanced after being bumped at the start. Sent forward to take the lead, travelled strongly, led by 2L turning in and all the way to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 起步時被碰撞，其後失去平衡。受催策上前領放，走勢強勁。入直路時領先二個馬位。一放到底，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Tracked leader, challenged alongside winner from 300m out, unable to get past that rival.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領放馬。自三百米處起在頭馬側旁展開挑戰，但未能超越對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Still plenty to do 400m out after held up, stayed on out wide, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 留後。四百米處仍落後頗遠。在外疊保持走勢。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Mid-field, had to wait for run behind leaders 300m out, went clear with winner from 200m, beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置。三百米處居領先馬匹之後，須等待空位出現。自二百米處起與頭馬雙雙帶離對手。僅以短距離之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) In rear after crowded shortly after start, improved into mid-field by 400m out, angled wide home straight, stayed on final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居後列。四百米處進佔中間位置。直路上移出外疊。最後二百米保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped with them, raced better than midfield, 3 wide with no cover, very wide turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。直路上保持佳勢，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced prominently, weakened 250m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居前列。二百五十米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。保持走勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下領放。走勢暢順，已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居第二位。入直路時落後半個馬位。二百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on nicely for 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。末段保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Showed good speed to lead, headed 600m out, remained prominent, dropped away quickly final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;展現甚快前速領放。六百米處被超越，仍居前列。最後三百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly until 250M, slightly weakened.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下領放。走勢強勁直至二百五十米處。略為轉弱。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Jumped well and showed good speed to lead, kept on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，展現甚快前速領放。末段保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from gate 9, raced prominently on the inside early, allowed rival to cross near 750M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well in straight but always just held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，早段居前列，走內疊。接近七百五十米處時讓對手過頭。直路彎緊隨領放馬。直路上保持佳勢，但一直以些微距離落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run after turning in, bumped 300M and 200M, found daylight approaching 100M, made no progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 起步時向內斜跑及被碰撞，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後未能望空。三百米處及二百米處發生碰撞。趨近一百米處時望空。其後毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，在催策下上前領放。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Sat on pace 3 wide, weakened and gave ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊。末段轉弱及墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled behind the leaders, one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居領先馬匹之後。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Mid-field, one paced under pressure home straight, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置。直路上在催策下保持同速。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Outpaced towards rear of mid-field from halfway, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自半程起被拋離，居中間之後位置。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, never involved. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 居後列，走第二疊。從未參與競逐。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear, 2 away from the stands' rail, switched to the middle track after passing 400M, no clear run until approaching 150M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)起步後不久發生碰撞，居後列，走外欄第三疊。跑過四百米處後移至跑道中央。未能望空直至趨近一百五十米處。末段衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W2W1W1W) Sat on pace, weakened from the 600M. (Unacceptable Performance, must trial) (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W2W1W1W) 居前列。自六百米處起轉弱。（表現難以接受，必須試閘及格。）（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped well and led, kept on until weakened final 75M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，領放。保持走勢，最後七十五米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Broke well settling just off the pace in 2nd, came to join race leader rounding home bend holding every chance in straight until unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居領放馬稍後的第二位。轉直路彎時追上領放馬。直路上一度甚具爭勝機會，但最後一百五十米後勁不繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Made all, kicked 300m out and three lengths clear 100m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 全程領放。三百米處加速。一百米處帶離三個馬位。末段領先距離收窄，但一直保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(+) (1W1W) Showed good pace to lead, kept on but no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(+)(1W1W) 前速甚快，取得領先。保持走勢，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, finished off strongly, just beaten by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊。衝刺強勁，僅以一馬頸位之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made all, responded well when challenged from over 400m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough, cozy winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 沿途領放。自四百米處起受挑戰時對催策反應良佳。末段領先距離收窄，但一直保持佳勢，從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W2W) Pressed on to sit outside the leader from gate 7, run peaked at 250M and dropped off quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W2W) 自第七檔出閘，受催策以居領放馬外側。二百五十米處未能再增速。末段迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Slowly away, in rear on outside towards centre of track, some headway into mid-field final 300m, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘緩慢，居後列，走外疊，靠近跑道中央競跑。最後三百米略為追前至中間位置。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W) Wide in mid-field, quickly lost place from top of home straight and well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W) 居中間位置，走外疊。自直路初起迅速失位。所負頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (2W3W) Away well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide from 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。自五百五十米處起走第三疊。直路初未能再加速。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7-1/2L back turning in, made little progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 自外檔出閘，留居包尾位置。入直路時落後七個半馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Settled in front of midfield, gave ground from the Turn, failed to respond.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間之前位置。自直路彎起墮退。對催策毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W2W) Sat towards the rear, made good late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W2W) 居後列。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear, 8 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自第十一檔出閘，留居後列。入直路時落後八個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Tracked pace, perfectly placed 400m out, unable to quicken, faded final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領放馬。四百米處居好位。其後未能加速，最後二百五十米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W4W) Settled towards rear, gained closer to 7th over 4L back inside the 800M, 3-wide rounding home bend and widest into straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W4W) 居後列。八百米處追近至第七位，落後逾四個馬位。轉直路彎時走第三疊，入直路時走最外疊。保持穩勢，未能增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Waited with in rear, headway and in touch with leaders when running out of room under 150m out, unable to be ridden out after.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居後列，留力候上。上前，一百五十米處空位不足之際跟隨領先馬匹，但其後未能受力策。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Dropped out from wide draw, still in last place top of home straight, not best of runs in home straight, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居包尾位置。直路上取位不太暢順。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat behind midfield, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間之後位置。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Mustered no early speed and settled last, made up some steady ground when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 早段缺乏前速，居尾列。在催策下穩步上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，落後約兩個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) In rear after awkward start, dropped to last place 600m out, outpaced and left behind final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。六百米處墮後至包尾位置。最後三百米未能跟上步速，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Ridden early before gradually dropping to midfield or slightly worse 3-wide, made no impression in the run to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 早段受催策，其後逐漸墮居中間或中間稍後位置，走第三疊。末段毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Held up, well held from top of home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 留後。自直路初起落後甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Settled towards rear on rail after sluggish start, baulked behind runners between the 500 and 250M, made no further impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，走內欄。五百米處至二百五十米處之間在馬群之後受困。其後再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress until no clear run final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自大外檔出閘，留居後列。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上追前甚多，直至最後五十米未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled in front of midfield on the rail, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Bumped leaving stalls, three wide in mid-field, taken wider into home straight, no extra final 300m, eased final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 出閘時被碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時移出更外疊。最後三百米再無餘力，最後一百米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (5W3W3W) Caught 3 wide no cover on pace, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(5W3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (1W1W1W) Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(1W1W1W) 出閘一般，受催策上前領放。轉入直路時領先半個馬位。直路初保持佳勢，一百五十米處未能再加速，被超越。保持穩勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W4W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W4W) 起步時被碰撞及失去平衡，居中間位置，走第三疊。直路彎沒有遮擋。直路上保持佳勢，取得第四名，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, challenged and every chance from top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自直路初起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間之前位置，走內疊。沿途走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) In rear after sluggish start, switched wide for clear run 500m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。五百米處移出外疊以望空。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W4W) Four wide in rear of mid-field, taken wider on bend, stayed on well in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第四疊。直路彎被帶出更外疊。在多駒幾乎齊過終點下保持佳勢。

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Settled at the rear 3 wide, never in contention. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居後列，走第三疊。從未參與競逐。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Moderate start, gradually recovered along rail to be up with the pace after the first 200M, shifted 2L back to 4th 600M out on top of home bend, renewed effort inside final 200M but never threatened the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 起步普通，其後沿欄逐漸恢復走勢，過了首二百米後跟上步速。六百米處直路彎早段居第四位，落後兩個馬位。最後二百米重新發力，但從未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, checked 200M, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。二百米處勒避。保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W) Taken back to the rear from wide draw, remained in last 400M 5Ls to make up, came from well back and made some inroads, but couldn't get into it.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列。四百米處仍居包尾位置，落後五個馬位。自遙遙落後的位置略為追前，但未能上前爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Began awkwardly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field, followed winner into home straight, ran on well to close on winner late but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時跟隨頭馬。末段以佳勢上前，追近頭馬，但始終未能超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Settled down in midfield 4Ls off the good pace, worked home evenly from 400M to go 3rd 150M but wasn't good enough to challenge first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，落後步速甚快的領放馬四個馬位。自四百米處起以穩勢衝刺，一百五十米處進佔第三位，但未能挑戰首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Niggled along in forward of midfield on rail, steadied up in slackened tempo rounding home bend, baulked behind runners after straightening, quickened well inside final 150M to just get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 受催策，居中間之前位置，走內欄。轉直路彎步速減慢時收慢。入直路後在馬匹之後受困。最後一百五十米加速良佳。終點線上僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Three wide in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路初受催策，但速度不足以展開挑戰。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, made minor ground. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; Began well, restrained to race in midfield 3Ls back, couldn't accelerate enough passing halfway. Never a threat to leaders.
(Lost left front plate.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;出閘迅速，受約束，居中間位置，落後三個馬位。跑過半程時加速力不足。從未能威脅領先馬匹。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) From draw 1 always in touch behind leaders, ran on well final 300M but couldn't get near to the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，一直居領先馬匹之後的啣接位置。最後三百米走勢良佳，但未能追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Held up from wide draw, taken to outer 200m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留後。二百米處移出外疊。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped awkwardly settling in 5th some 3L back, hampered and lost position over 700M out, met minor interference 400M out and dropped out noticeably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，居第五位，落後約三個馬位。七百米處受阻礙，失位。四百米處略為受干擾，顯著墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Began well from gate 12, raced prominently, 3 wide, there to turn, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 自第十二檔出閘迅速，居前列，走第三疊。直路彎前居相同位置。一百五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Prominent early, gradually drifted backward to 10th some 5L off the pace by the 800M, saved ground turning in for home, faded inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 早段居前列。逐漸墮後，八百米處居第十位，落後領放馬約五個馬位。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程。最後一百五十米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初未能再加速。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leader, chased along bend to hold position, dropped away quickly 400m out, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。直路彎力追以保持位置。四百米處迅速墮退，遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Wide in mid-field, short of room top of home straight, soon held once clear 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走外疊。直路初空位不足。三百米處望空後瞬即落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W) Sat behind midfield, lay in in the early Straight, gave ground inside 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。直路初內閃。一百五十米處墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) Jumped only fairly, given a waiting ride towards the rear, brought wide into straight before running on moderately to the finish. Posed no threat to first three however.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，留力候上。入直路時移出外疊。保持不俗走勢至終點，但未能對頭三名馬匹構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Held up last after crowded leaving stalls, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘時受擠迫，其後留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置，毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for room turning into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Waited with towards rear, forced to angle wide for clear run 150m out, quickened well final 100m to lead late on, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。一百五十米處被迫移出外疊以望空。最後一百米加速良佳，末段進佔領先位置，從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Began smartly from a tricky draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速。最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, closed off nicely, just lost in a photo.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。末段衝刺良佳，在電眼判決下僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W5W) Wide in mid-field, keen mid-race, weakened 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走外疊。中段搶口。三百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Ridden along in first few, drifted over 2L back in 5th 800M out, slightly worse into straight but recovered some late ground closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 受催策，居前列。八百米處墮居第五位，落後逾兩個馬位。入直路時略為墮後，但末段收復部分失地。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W2W) Ridden forward gradually from a wide barrier to join the leader 800M out, came under pressure again from 500M out but folded up quickly after straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W2W) 自外檔出閘，在催策下逐漸上前，八百米處追上領放馬。自五百米處起再度受催策，但入直路後迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W) Out in line, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W2W) Broke well from a poor draw holding 2nd 2-wide, quickened to hit the front entering home straight only to overhauled 200M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W2W) 自第十一檔出閘迅速，保持居第二位，走第二疊。其後加速，進入直路時取得領先，僅於二百米處被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Jumped well, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, battled on one-paced under pressure in the straight. No threat to leaders final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘迅速，追趕領先馬匹，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上在催策下保持同速。最後一百五十米未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Raced in rear, pushed along 500m out, outpaced and left behind in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列。五百米處受推策。直路上未能跟上步速，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W2W2W) Crowded shortly after start, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W2W2W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居包尾位置。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W4W) Crowded on jumping, taken back to race at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W4W) 躍出時受擠迫，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, same position on turn, one-paced in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎居相同位置。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made running, headed 150m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;帶頭。一百五十米處被超越，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Driven along from stalls to lead 700m out, kicked 300m out, stayed on well but headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘後受催策。七百米處取得領先。三百米處加速。保持佳勢，但接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, travelled up smoothly top of the Straight, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 居前列，走第二疊。直路初走勢暢順。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) In last few early stages, forced to check 900M out before pulling forward wide around home bend, fought on under pressure from just over 2L back into straight until finding no extra close to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 早段居最後數位內。九百米處被迫勒避。轉直路彎時上前，走外疊。入直路時落後稍逾兩個馬位，在催策下力拼，直至接近終點時再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W) Started well from wide draw and across to make running, came under pressure 200m out, challenged by runner-up final 100m, responded and always holding that rival final 50m despite edging left.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，切入領放。二百米處受催策。最後一百米受亞軍馬匹挑戰。最後五十米雖然向外斜跑，但對催策交出反應，一直力拒該匹對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W) Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 400M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W) 留居後列，走第二疊。跑過四百米處後向外移出。轉入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W3W) Lifted front feet on jumping, raced prominently but trapped wide early, slightly taken back after passing 1000M, raced 3 wide better than midfield on turn, challenged the leader early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W3W) 躍出時一對前腳並舉，早段居前列，但走外疊。跑過一千米處後略為留後。直路彎居中間之前位置，走第三疊。直路初挑戰領放馬。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, ridden top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路初受催策，在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Raced in touch with leaders, unable to quicken 300m out, no extra and lost ground final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處未能加速。最後一百五十米再無餘力，失地。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Began awkwardly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，沿途居後列。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Settled midfield, raced very wide, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置，走大外疊。對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; A fraction slow away from the stalls, ridden along to be two off the outside fence just behind the speed, off the bit from the 500m and dropped away thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘稍慢，受催策，居領放馬稍後位置，走外欄第三疊。自五百米處起受催策，其後墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Began well from gate 14, raced behind midfield on the stands' rail, made some progress final 400M to make frame, no threat to the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;自第十四檔出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走外欄。最後四百米略為追前，取得第四名，但未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Settled midfield, raced very wide from 600M, limited response when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置。自六百米處起走大外疊。對催策反應平平。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Broke fairly and settled midfield the rail, stayed at the same pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘一般，居中間位置，走內欄。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Waited with in rear, checked 350m out, passed a few tiring rivals, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。三百五十米處勒避。超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 400M, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W3W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。四百米處向外移出。直路上移出外疊，追前甚多。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Tracked pace, rail position, ridden to chase leader 350m out, no extra 150m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。三百五十米處在催策下追趕領放馬。一百五十米處再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, angled out 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。中段搶口。五百五十米處向外移出。直路初未能再增速。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W3W) Badly crowded shortly after start, settled in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run until 250m out, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W3W) 起步後不久嚴重受擠迫，居中間之後位置。須等待空位出現直至二百五十米處。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Sat last on the rail, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，留居包尾位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W3W) Shortly after the start was tight for galloping room and was then ridden conservatively, responded well under reminders in the home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W3W) 起步後不久受緊迫，繼而留後。直路上對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Bumped out of stalls and crowded shortly after start, rail position in mid-field, effort 400m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘時被碰撞，其後不久受擠迫，居中間位置，走內欄。四百米處受催策。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, lay out throughout the middle stages, angled out 400M, one-paced in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。中段沿途外閃。四百米處向外移出。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat last, never impress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居尾列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W5W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, detached 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W5W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。三百米處被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Waited with in rear, stuck to inside rail, ridden over 300m out, soon no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上，固守內欄。三百米處受催策，但瞬即毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Mid-field, stayed on at the one pace under pressure final 200m, never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。最後二百米在催策下保持同速，從未能對領先馬匹構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Sat worse than midfield, traveled fairly, crowded near the 150M, found nothing thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走勢一般。接近一百五十米處時受擠迫。其後再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat at the rear, no clear running until final furlong, made good late ground before held up in the concluding stages. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列。未能望空直至二百米處。末段追前甚多，其後受困。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。直路初受催策。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Dropped out from widest draw, under pressure 550m out, stayed on but never going pace to challenge leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。五百五十米處受催策。保持走勢，但從未能加速以挑戰領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, good headway 400m out to 200m out, short of room final 200m, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。四百米處至二百米處追前甚多，最後二百米空位不足，未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Sat on pace, shifted ground in the Straight, still green (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居前列。直路上斜跑，走勢仍然稚嫩。（見競賽事件報告。）

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W3W) Quickly into stride, raced prominently just off the pace, struggled to keep up nearing 500M, no extra mid-straight weakened to last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 出閘迅速，居領放馬稍後的前列位置。接近五百米處時難以跟上對手。直路中段再無餘力，轉弱，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, kept on same pace to the line.
(Lost right hind plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初略為追前，二百米處未能再增速，保持穩勢至終點。
（失去右後蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (5W4W3W4W) Caught wide no cover chasing the pace, struggled to keep up home turn, weakened badly on straightening and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance / No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(5W4W3W4W) 追趕領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎掙扎上前。入直路時嚴重轉弱。包尾大敗而回。（表現難以接受。賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Pressed forward from a poor draw before settling one-out-one-back, remained just over 2L back in 4th most of the way to 500M, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend but could find nothing in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 自第七檔出閘，受催策上前，其後居第二疊第二位。大部分途程保持居第四位，落後稍逾兩個馬位，直至五百米處。轉直路彎時在第三疊開始上前，但直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Raced in midfield along the fence, made some progress from 500M but outpaced by rivals mid-straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。自五百米處起略為追前，但直路中段被對手拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Caught racing 3-wide in midfield, couldn't quicken when asked 400M, out of contention mid-straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。四百米處受催策，但未能加速。直路中段再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W2W) Tracked leader in the first half of the race, struggled to keep up when pace quickened from 1000M, fought on one paced final 400M. Never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 賽事前半段跟隨領放馬。自一千米處起步速加快時掙扎上前。最後四百米在力拼下保持同速。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Raced in rear after crowded at start, lost balance 1000m out, dropped to last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 起步時受擠迫，其後居後列。一千米處失去平衡。直路初墮居包尾位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in last few on rail, switched out early in home straight but soon ran out of room inside the 200M, made no impression thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居最後數位之內，走內欄。直路早段向外移出，但二百米處瞬即空位不足。其後毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走內疊。沿途走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Jumped fairly, ended up racing in a rearward spot 6-7Ls off leader, ran on moderately in the straight but not able to trouble leaders.
(Jockey dropped whip at 550M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘一般，居後列，落後領放馬六至七個馬位。直路上略為追前，但未能威脅領先馬匹。
（於五百五十米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （於五百五十米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W4W) In rear after crowded at start, taken wider final bend, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列。直路彎移出較外疊。未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W2W) Settled towards the rear on the rail after a sluggish start, travelled okay throughout, failed to show his usual turn of foot with good pace up front.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，走內欄。沿途走勢尚可。賽事步速偏快，未能展現慣常加速力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W3W) Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走內疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W2W5W) Dropped out swiftly from widest draw, pushed along wide 500m out, stayed on but unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後迅速墮後。五百米處受推策，走外疊。保持走勢，但未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W2W) Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
(Lame in right hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(3W2W2W2W) 起步後不久被碰撞及失去平衡，居第二位，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。末段保持穩勢。
（右後腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (5W2W2W4W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(5W2W2W4W) 自最外檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約七個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat on pace, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居前列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, found rail near 950M, shared lead on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列。接近九百五十米處時移入內欄。直路彎並排領先。直路初未能再增速，被超越。最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Average to begin, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1250M, 2nd in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 出閘普通，早段受催策上前領放。接近一千二百五十米處時被超越。中段居第二位。直路初對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Taken back to race at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, under pressure 500m out, unable to quicken, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘後不久發生碰撞。五百米處受催策。未能加速，毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) From draw 2 obtained a midfield position along the fence, held up on the home turn but failed to finish off when asked in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第二檔出閘，居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎受困，但在直路上在催策下未能以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) From wide draw dropped back to race in last, had plenty to do 400M, couldn't improve.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘，留居包尾位置。四百米處落後甚遠。未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W3W) Commenced well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後六至七個馬位。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Positioned ahead of midfield, held his position to home turn, under the pump 400M but soon gave way. (Jockey - did not run out 1800M in his opinion.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置。保持位置至直路彎。四百米處受催策，但瞬即墮退。（騎師表示，他認為坐騎未能應付千八米途程。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W4W4W) Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on outer, a bit closer turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W4W4W) 自第九檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時略為追近。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, disputed led on bend, headed by winner 550m out, weakened quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。直路彎爭奪領先。五百五十米處被頭馬超越。最後二百米迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure to hold position from 800m out, dropped away quickly in home straight, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。自八百米處起受催策以保持位置。直路上迅速墮退，洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Began only fairly, raced in second half of the field along the 3-path, driven 500M but couldn't quicken, never able to challenge. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後半馬群中，走第三疊。五百米處受催策但未能加速。從未能作出挑戰。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W1W1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, outpaced and left behind final 500m, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W1W1W1W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。未能跟上步速，最後五百米被拋離。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, recovered to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙及失地，恢復走勢，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速。最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Settled in midfield in 6th within 5L off the pace, went wide for a run into straight but could only run home one-paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間第六位，落後領放馬不逾五個馬位。入直路時走外疊取位，但末段僅保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled not far off on rail, drifted some 4L off the pace in 5th about 1200M out, slightly closer into home straight, fought on under pressure to reach 2.5L 2nd 100M out but without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 落後領先馬匹不遠，走內欄。約千二米處居第五位，落後領放馬約四個馬位。入直路時略為追近。在催策下力拼，一百米處進佔第二位，落後兩個半馬位，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Sat rear, switched out at the Turn, lay in in the Straight, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居後列。直路彎向外移出。直路上內閃。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Broke well settling towards rear, 3-wide behind midfield early in back straight before gaining closer to within 4L of pace briefly 700M out, soon drifted some 5L back to 8th onto home bend, one-paced in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，居後列。對面直路早段居中間之後位置，走第三疊。七百米處追近，一度落後領放馬不逾四個馬位。開始轉直路彎時瞬即墮退至第八位，落後約五個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Driven along and outpaced early stages, still in rear top of home straight, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 早段受催策，但未能跟上步速。直路初仍居後列。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, dropped to rear turning into home straight, ran on well, just lost second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時墮居後列。走勢良佳，僅失去亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W1W) Raced in rear, pushed along final bend to chase main body of runners, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 居後列。直路彎受推策以追趕主馬群。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。直路初仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Waited with in rear, still in rear top of home straight, unable to improve position, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初仍居後列。未能追前。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped on jumping, driven forward to hold a position ahead of midfield, ran home one paced, soon out of contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，受催策上前，居中間之前位置。末段保持同速，瞬即再無爭逐機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘，留後。沿途居後列。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped awkwardly and unbalanced, raced 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，失去平衡，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Jumped only fairly, restrained to race near last, driven along 500M, held up briefly near 200M but never going the pace to challenge leaders. (Jockey - no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，受約束，居接近包尾位置。五百米處受催策。接近二百米處時一度受困，但速度不足以挑戰領先馬匹。（騎師未能就坐騎令人失望的表現提供任何解釋。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) Bumped leaving stalls, settled in mid-field, switched and driven 400m out, ran on well to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，居中間位置。四百米處轉換跑線及受催策。以佳勢上前，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W5W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W5W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。末段在催策下衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一個馬位。直路上保持甚佳走勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, keen early, ridden on bend to chase leaders out wide, short-lived effort 300m out, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。早段搶口。直路彎在催策下追趕領先馬匹，走外疊。三百米處一度上前。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, only one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。在催策下僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W) Began well travelling keenly just over 2L back in 3rd, drifted slightly backward to 5th over 700M out, swung wide into straight and weakened under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，落後稍逾兩個馬位，搶口。七百米處稍為墮後至第五位。入直路時移出外疊，在催策下轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, under pressure 600m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。六百米處受催策。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, switched for clear run 500m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處轉換跑線以望空。保持走勢，但速度不足以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Up with early pace before easing back to race ahead of midfield, had some difficulty obtaining clear running 300M-200M then attacked the line well to be nearest at the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 早段跟上前速，其後收慢留居中間之前位置。三百米處至二百米處之間頗為難以望空，其後以佳勢衝刺。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W1W) Blundered on jumping, chased leaders in 3rd, driven along 400M and moved up to 2nd nearing 200M, couldn't get closer to the winner final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W1W) 躍出時失蹄。追趕領先馬匹，居第三位。四百米處受催策，接近二百米處時上前進佔第二位。末段未能追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Went forward and settled just off the pace early stages before drifting back to a position ahead of midfield halfway, fought on one paced to the line final 300M and not making ground on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 早段上前，居領放馬稍後位置。半程時墮居中間之前位置。最後三百米力拼，保持同速，未能追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Positively ridden, settled just outside the lead, fought hard to stay in contention from 400M, still with leaders 100M before run came to an end and faded.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 受積極催策，居領放馬外側。自四百米處起在力拼下保持爭逐機會。一百米處仍居領先馬匹之中，其後無以為繼及力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (3W2W) Made contact at start, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide from 800M, same margin back on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(3W2W) 起步時發生觸碰，落後約一個馬位，走第三疊。自八百米處起走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Shifted in and bumped at start, raced in rear, still in rear top of home straight, switched for clear run 300m out, lacked pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 起步時向內斜跑及發生碰撞，居後列。直路初仍居後列。三百米處轉換跑線以望空，但速度不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Three wide in rear of mid-field without cover, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時受推策，走外疊。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W6W) Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W6W) 自第十二檔出閘，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上衝刺乏力。

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Broke well from a wide barrier to share the pace 2-wide, drifted slightly backward rounding home bend before hitting the front just inside the 400M, kicked over 1L clear 200M out only to be swamped inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，並排領先，走第二疊。轉直路彎時略為墮退。跑過四百米處後取得領先。二百米處加速帶離逾一個馬位，僅於最後一百米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leader against rail, short of room against rail top of home straight, checked 200m out, lost all chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。直路初走內欄，空位不足。二百米處勒避。再無爭逐機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Three wide in mid-field, taken widest into home straight, ran on well to challenge 200m out, tired closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時走最外疊。二百米處以佳勢追前以展開挑戰。末段呈疲態。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Settled about 6L off the pace in 4th on rail, in similar position into straight, fought on steadily without threatening the place-getters.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居第四位，落後領放馬約六個馬位，走內欄。入直路時居相若位置。末段持續力拼，但未能威脅頭三名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W4W) Settled in midfield, came under pressure over 500M out, made no impression in straight but dropped away quickly inside final 150M.
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。五百米處受催策。直路上毫無表現，最後一百五十米迅速墮退。
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Caught 3 wide on pace, weakened final 75M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊。最後七十五米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W6W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear, 7 lengths back, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W6W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，落後七個馬位。入直路時走大外疊。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Pressed forward to be racing just off the leader, ran on well under pressure from 400M, briefly led inside 200M but not finishing as well as the first two late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;受催策上前跟隨領放馬。自四百米處起受催策以佳勢上前，最後二百米一度領先，但末段衝刺不及前兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。末段持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled within striking distance in 3rd on rail, tight for a run early in straight, gained upper hand 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居第三位，落後領放馬不遠，走內欄。直路早段緊迫競跑。一百米處佔得上風。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, driven 300m out, headed by winner 200m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。三百米處受催策。二百米處被頭馬超越。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Made contact at start, sent forward to race prominently, travelled well to turn, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時與對手互相觸碰，受催策上前，居前列。直路彎前走勢良佳。三百米處取得領先。二百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後一百米轉弱。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) From wide draw taken across behind horses, held up near last 8Ls off the pace, picked up well early straight but run ended 150M from home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘後在馬群之後切入，留居接近包尾位置，落後領放馬八個馬位。直路早段加速良佳，但一百五十米處無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Strode forward vying for the lead on inside, led the charge from 500M, headed near 250M, soon no extra and weakened away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 展步上前爭奪領先，走內疊。五百米處起取得領先。接近二百五十米處時被超越，瞬即再無餘力及轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Inconvenienced at start from the widest barrier before gradually taken back for cover, obtained cover 2-wide in 9th onto first turn dropping to last into straight, produced good late impression under pressure final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 自大外檔起步時受妨礙，其後逐漸留後以取得遮擋。開始轉直路彎時居第九位，走第二疊，有遮擋。入直路時墮居包尾位置。最後二百米在催策下追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped leaving stalls, dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘時發生碰撞，墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W2W) Slowly away, held up last, pushed along 500m out, still plenty to do top of home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W2W) 出閘緩慢，留居包尾位置。五百米處受推策。直路初仍落後頗遠。最後二百米以勁勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Crowded at start, tracked leaders, travelled smoothly to chase leaders top of home straight, strong run to lead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 起步時受擠迫，跟隨領先馬匹。走勢暢順，直路初追趕領先馬匹。走勢強勁，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) With leaders early stages, taken one back to joint 3rd some 2L off the pace in back straight, slightly further away in 4th rounding home bend, ran on under pressure to hit the front 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 早段跟隨領先馬匹。對面直路上留後一個馬位，並列第三位，落後領放馬約兩個馬位。轉直路彎時略為墮退至第四位。在催策下上前，一百米處取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Bumped on jumping, held up behind midfield 4-5Ls off the pace, responded only fairly from 400M and failed to see out the 1600m trip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，留居中間之後位置，落後領放馬四至五個馬位。自四百米處起對催策反應僅屬一般。未能應付千六米途程。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W6W) From draw 12 caught racing wide no cover behind mid-division, stayed on mildly down the outside on straightening. Couldn't get to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W6W) 自第十二檔出閘，居中間之後位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時在外疊保持普通走勢。未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped only fairly, towards rear, had to wait for run between 400m out and 300m out, stayed on, nearly got up for second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。四百米處至三百米處之間須等待空位出現。保持穩勢，幾乎跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Taken back from gate 12, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 450M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。四百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders out wide, stayed in contention until no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 出閘時向內斜跑及被碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。保持爭逐機會，直至最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, forced to steady on heels 800m out, switched inside for clear run 300m out, ran on well to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。八百米處被迫收慢避開他駒後蹄。三百米處移入內疊以望空。以佳勢上前，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, ran on well to lead 200m out, pressed by runner-up but stayed on well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。以佳勢上前，二百米處取得領先。末段被亞軍馬匹追迫，但保持佳勢，保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W2W) In rear when checked and dropped to joint last on 1000M bend, saved ground on the inside turning for home, obtained a clear run over 150M out and finished off the race well.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W2W) 居後列，勒避。一千米處彎位墮退，並列包尾位置。轉直路彎時走內疊節省腳程。一百五十米處望空，衝刺良佳。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W5W) From wide draw dropped back to race near last, driven along 500M and wide into straight, closed off fastest to claim 2nd. Nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W5W) 自外檔出閘，墮居接近包尾位置。五百米處受催策。入直路時走外疊。末段衝刺最快，跑獲亞軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W) Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well until 100M, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先半個馬位，保持佳勢至一百米處。五十米處未能再增速及被超越，接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Fast break, made all, kicked and quickened early in home straight, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，帶頭競跑。直路初加速，帶離對手。末段領先距離收窄，但保持佳勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Ridden along from stalls to lead, pressed in front, headed 300m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘後受催策，取得領先。在領放下受追迫。三百米處被超越。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Fast break, made running, pressed by runner-up throughout, headed 350m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，帶頭競跑。沿途被亞軍馬匹追迫。三百五十米處被超越。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away, positioned 1-1/4L behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, kept on well until 150M, weakened 100M, eased closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，落後領放馬一又四分一個馬位，走內欄。直路彎居相同位置。保持佳勢直至一百五十米處，一百米處轉弱，末段收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Pressed forward to join the leaders obtaining rails run onto home bend, shared pace early in straight until swamped under pressure inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前，追上領先馬匹。開始轉直路彎時移入內欄。直路初並排領先，直至最後二百米在催策下被後上馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield but never far off from leaders, stayed on reasonably well final 300M. Not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘笨拙，居中間位置，但從未遠離領先馬匹。最後三百米保持頗佳走勢，所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W) Driven forward form draw 10 to take up running, shook off rivals early straight to open up 2.5L lead mid-straight, caught by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W) 自第十檔出閘後受催策上前領放。直路早段擺脫對手，直路中段帶離兩個半馬位。接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Shifted in at start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, challenged the leaders early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步時向內斜跑，落後領放馬兩個馬位，走內欄。沿途走內欄節省腳程。直路初挑戰領先馬匹。一百五十米處未能再增速。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sped forward to take up running, raced keenly entering back straight, opened up a big lead before steadying the pace home turn, ran on again final 200M to hold pursuing rivals at bay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 加速上前帶頭。進入對面直路時搶口。遙遙領先，其後在直路彎減慢步速。最後二百米再度上前，力拒緊追的對手掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 自第十一檔出閘後留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W4W2W2W) Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 1200M, took the lead 900M, led by 3/4L in the middle stages, headed 400M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W4W2W2W) 出閘稍慢，居中間之後位置，走外疊。跑過千二米處後受催策上前。九百米處取得領先。中段領先四分三馬位。四百米處被超越。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Close up early gradually settling one-out-one-back, improved to 2nd shortly after straightening but never able to trouble the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 早段緊隨領先馬匹，逐漸居第二疊第二位。入直路後不久進佔第二位，但從未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Bumped at the start, from a middle draw crossed towards the stand's side tracking leader, within striking distance always, responded well final 300M only to be out-finished by winner late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;自中檔起步時發生碰撞，切向外欄，跟隨領放馬，一直落後不遠。最後三百米對催策反應良佳，末段僅不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W) Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間稍前位置，落後約兩個馬位，走第二疊。末段衝刺良佳，取得亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled just better than midfield in 4th or 5th on rail, came to challenge under pressure on straightening but could only make modest headway.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間稍前的第四或第五位，走內欄。入直路時在催策下展開挑戰，但僅能略為上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Waited with towards rear, wide into home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時走外疊。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Amongst leaders 3-wide, obtained outright lead on rail about 900M out setting a smart pace, led the field until joined 200M out, soon weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 居領先馬群中，走第三疊。約九百米處以甚快步速單騎領放，走內欄。保持領先，直至二百米處被追上，瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Tracked pace, ridden 300m out, no extra and lost ground on leaders final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;跟隨領放馬。三百米處受催策。最後二百米再無餘力，落後領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Broke well gradually settling about 2L off the pace on rail in 5th or 4th, chased leaders into straight but tight between runners on straightening, fought on to hold every chance until swamped about 70M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘迅速，其後逐漸居第四或第五位，落後領放馬約兩個馬位，走內欄。入直路時追趕領先馬匹，但在馬匹之間緊迫競跑。末段力拼，一度甚具爭勝機會，直至約七十米處被後上馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Jumped only fairly, ended up as the back marker from 600M, couldn't keep up 400M, soon beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘僅屬一般。自六百米處起居包尾位置，四百米處未能跟上對手，瞬即洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled just worse than midfield, found no extra upon straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間稍後位置。入直路後再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Crowded at start, settled just worse than midfield, saved ground on the inside turning for home, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間稍後位置。轉直路彎時走內疊節省腳程。穩步上前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Began well from draw 1, restrained to a midfield spot, raced keenly in the middle stages, kept on well enough in the straight but not going the pace of first two final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，受約束，居中間位置。中段搶口。直路上保持佳勢，但最後二百米加速力不及頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, reserved behind midfield in a fast run race, finished off fairly well final 300M but not going the pace of first two closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居中間之後位置，賽事步速偏快。最後三百米衝刺不俗，但末段加速力不及頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Sat midfield center field, crowded at 500M, weakened and faded thereafter. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;居中間位置，在跑道中央競跑。五百米處受擠迫，其後轉弱及力竭。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W2W) Jumped well from draw 1, always prominent chasing leading pair, soon into clear on straightening, battled on well under top weight to wrestle the lead inside 100M. Gutsy win.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，一直居前列，追趕領先兩駒。入直路時瞬即望空。負頂磅下以佳勢力拼，最後一百米爭奪領先。力拼下獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) Given a waiting ride towards the rear, 4Ls to make up 400M, closed off well to take 4th close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)居後列，留力候上。四百米處落後四個馬位。衝刺良佳，接近終點時進佔第四位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, keen middle stages, driven along 500m out, switched for clear run 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置。中段搶口。五百米處受催策。三百米處轉換跑線以望空。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Blundered out of stalls, held up, pushed along wide into home straight, outpaced and left behind final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 出閘時失蹄，留後。入直路時受推策，走外疊。最後二百五十米未能跟上步速，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled down midfield 3Ls off leaders, ran on steadily final 300M for 3rd but couldn't quite get to first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，落後領先馬匹三個馬位。最後三百米以穩勢上前，跑獲季軍，但未能追上首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Began well from the one draw gradually settling some 2L back in 4th or 3rd on rail, soon came to challenge on straightening holding every chance over 150M out, swamped for a placing in final few strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，逐漸居第三或第四位，落後約兩個馬位，走內欄。入直路時瞬即展開挑戰。一百五十米處一度甚具爭勝機會，但最後數步被超越，失去位置。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Pressed forward after moderate start from the widest draw, settled in 9th 3-wide with cover, became 10th past 700M, obtained clear passage down the centre of track over 200M out, finished off strongly to snatch victory final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 自最外檔出閘一般，受催策上前，居第九位，走第三疊，有遮擋。跑過七百米處時居第十位。二百米處望空，在跑道中央競跑，衝刺強勁，最後數步獲得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Broke well settling within 2L of pace in 3rd on rail, came to challenge upon straightening, gained upper hand 50M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，落後領放馬不逾兩個馬位，走內欄。入直路時上前展開挑戰。五十米處佔得上風。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, pushed along final bend, challenged up rail from 200m out, tight for room and bumped 150m out, ran on well to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路彎受推策。自二百米處起沿欄展開挑戰。一百五十米處受緊迫及發生碰撞。以佳勢上前，過終點時險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Began well before easing back to race in midfield, lay in home straight and proved difficult to ride under 7lb claimer, did best work late to claim 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，收慢留居中間位置。直路上內閃，在獲減七磅的騎師胯下難以策騎。末段表現最佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W1W) Gradually taken back from the widest draw, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W1W) 自最外檔出閘後逐漸留後。從未見具爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Close up early, dropped towards rear approaching the 1000M bend, remained in a similar position to home straight, fought on steadily under pressure despite a tight run just inside the 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 早段緊隨領放馬。趨近一千米處彎位時墮居後列。直路前仍居相若位置。儘管於跑過二百米處後緊迫競跑，但在催策下持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Waited with towards rear, headway up rail and made up several places in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路上沿欄追前數位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Jumped on terms, eased back to race towards the rear, closed off steadily final 300M without posing threat to first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，收慢留居後列。最後三百米衝刺平穩，但未能威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Checked on jumping, dropped back to last 10Ls behind runaway leader, plenty to do top of the straight, ran on well down the inside to claim 6th beaten just over 2L.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 躍出時勒避，墮居包尾位置，落後遙遙領先的領放馬十個馬位。直路初落後頗遠。末段在內疊以佳勢上前，取得第六名，以稍逾兩個馬位之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Tracked leading pair, impeded briefly 200m out when trying to make effort, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先兩駒。二百米處嘗試發力時一度受阻。再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked 350m out, ran on well but headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速以領放。三百五十米處加速。末段以佳勢上前，但接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Chased leader, didn't travel with much fluency, ridden top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 追趕領放馬，走勢欠順。直路初受催策。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made all, pressed in front, responded well when pressed on 300m out, stayed on well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 一放到底。在領放下受追迫。三百米處在催策下反應良佳。保持佳勢，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead approaching 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘俐落，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。趨近二百五十米處時取得領先。末段保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Showed good speed to lead 2 off the outside rail, kept on nicely, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;前速甚快，取得領先，走外欄第三疊。保持佳勢，僅保住平頭冠軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Disputed led, ran on strongly to take the lead 700m out, kicked 400m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;爭奪領先。以勁勢追前，七百米處取得領先。四百米處加速帶離。末段領先距離收窄，但一直保持佳勢，穩操勝券。

raceinfo_chi.Course: C 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, crowded 600m out, ridden along 250m out, ran on well but no match for winner, just held second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W2W2W) 居中間位置。六百米處受擠迫。二百五十米處受催策。走勢強勁，但未能抗衡頭馬，僅保住亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W1W2W) Began well enough, eased back to sit in mid-division 6Ls back, picked up strongly passing 300M, ran on determinedly and got past leader close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W1W2W) 出閘頗佳，收慢留居中間位置，落後六個馬位。跑過三百米處時加速強勁。末段以勁勢上前，接近終點時超越領放馬，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W4W) Caught racing wide no cover behind midfield, brought wide for home then closed off strongly to be beaten a head by the long time leader.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時移至外疊，其後以勁勢衝刺，以一馬頭位之差不敵領先了一段長途程的領放馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, driven 400m out to chase leaders, not best of runs early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 緊隨領先馬匹。四百米處受催策，追趕領先馬匹。直路早段未能完全望空。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W4W) Stumbled shortly after the start, failed to show sufficient pace to hold a more forward position, ended up in midfield 4-5Ls away, closed off one paced in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W4W) 起步後不久失蹄，未能展現足夠前速以佔取更為靠前位置，居中間位置，落後四至五個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W1W1W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, ran on nicely, just got passed near the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。以佳勢上前，僅於接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Broke well but soon dropped to joint 4th just over 2L back, became 5th in similar position about 800M out, ran on under pressure to hit the front just inside the 200M, hung on well to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 出閘迅速，但瞬即墮後，並居第四位，落後稍逾兩個馬位。約八百米處居相若的第五位。受催策上前，就在二百米處取得領先，保持佳勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W3W) Settled ahead of midfield, 4Ls behind leader 400M, closed off well under pressure for equal 3rd. Nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W3W) 居中間之前位置，四百米處落後領放馬四個馬位。在催策下衝刺良佳，取得平頭季軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, short of room 300m out to 200m out, eye-catching headway from rear final 100m, hampered close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。三百米處至二百米處之間空位不足。最後一百米自後列追前，走勢悅目。接近終點時受阻礙。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, driven along 800m out, some headway up rail in home straight but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。八百米處受催策。直路上沿欄略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room until approaching final 100M, kept on well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。空位不足直至趨近一百米處。保持佳勢，跑入季席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Jumped swiftly from middle of the line but happy to let the speed go, settled slightly worse than mid-pack, closed off well despite laying in concluding stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 自中檔出閘迅速，讓領先馬匹上前，居中間稍後位置。儘管末段內閃，但衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Waited with towards rear, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, ran on strongly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。未能望空直至二百米處。最後二百米走勢強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Settled in last few, baulked for a run after straightening, hung in and a difficult ride inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居最後數位之內。入直路後受困。最後二百米內閃，難以策騎。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路早段未能再增速。最後三百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一個半馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但終點線上不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Pressed forward from a wide barrier settling 3-wide without cover in 5th some 3L off the pace, gradually faded under pressure in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前，居第五位，落後領放馬約三個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上在催策下逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Away in line, went forward chasing leaders, raced keenly early and middle stages, couldn't keep up with the pace passing 250M, faded towards the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，上前追趕領先馬匹，早段及中段搶口。跑過二百五十米處時未能跟上步速。末段力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W2W) Ridden from stalls to track leader, quickened early to lead top of home straight, headed by winner 150m out, just held second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W2W) 出閘後受催策，跟隨領放馬。直路初率先加速，取得領先。一百五十米處被頭馬超越。僅保住亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Jumped well and led, kept on until weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，帶頭領放。保持走勢，直至最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until 150M, made some progress thereafter to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。未能望空直至一百五十米處，其後略為追前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Awkward start, three wide in rear of mid-field, taken wider on bend, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。直路彎移出較外疊。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Settled towards the rear on the rail, closed off strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居後列，走內欄。衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Settled behind midfield on the rail, closed off nicely, no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。末段衝刺良佳，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步時被碰撞，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名，未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, recovered to race in midfield along the fence, 4Ls behind leader 400M, ran on steadily for 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，其後恢後走勢，居中間位置，走內欄。四百米處落後領放馬四個馬位。以穩勢追前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Not the quickest out, sat towards the rear 3 off the outside rail, stayed on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;出閘並非最快，居後列，走外欄第四疊。保持一般走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 留居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。四百五十米處向外移出。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, positioned 1-1/4L behind the leader, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，落後領放馬一又四分一個馬位。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, driven along 700m out, unable to improve position, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。七百米處受催策。其後未能推進上前，遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Jumped ok and settled midfield one off the rail, angled out for a run 600M out, lacked a finishing effort and outsprinted (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘尚可，居中間位置，走第二疊。六百米處向外移出以取位。衝刺乏力，被超越。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; In rear after sluggish start, switched towards centre of course for clear run 300m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;起步緩慢，居後列。三百米處移向跑道中央以望空。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) Broke ok from gate 5, settled towards the rear with cover, switched course 250M out, swept past them and never looked back from there.
