runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)自第五檔出閘尚可，居後列，有遮擋。二百五十米處轉換跑線。末段超越其他對手，穩操勝券。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W3W4W) Unable to slot in from wide draw, caught wide in midfield and left without cover from 600M, ran home well enough final 300M to be beaten 1.5L at the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘，未能切入內疊，居中間位置，走外疊。自六百米處起沒有遮擋。最後三百米衝刺良佳，過終點時以一個半馬位之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初對催策反應平平。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Chased leaders in 3rd, fought hard to stay in contention on straightening, couldn't keep up with leaders final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 追趕領先馬匹，居第三位。入直路時力拼以保持爭逐機會。最後一百五十米未能跟上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W3W) Caught wide no cover early stages, strode forward to settle outside the lead, in 3rd spot making home turn but didn't have much left in tank on straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 早段走外疊，沒有遮擋。展步上前居領放馬外側。轉直路彎時居第三位，入直路時無甚餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Shifted out at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Raced wide towards rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Away well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，落後兩個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初對催策略有反應。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Moved up to press leader on outside, ran home one paced early straight, lost 2nd inside 200M and weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 上前追迫領放馬，走外疊。直路早段保持同速。最後二百米失去第二位及轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 起步時向外斜跑及被碰撞，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先四分一個馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Out with rest, raced 3 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第三疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Dropped out from wide draw, held up last, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Pushed on to chase leader in a fast run race, struggled to keep up from 500M, already beaten top of straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 在快步速下受推策，追趕領放馬。自五百米處起未能保持走勢。直路初已洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Tracked pace out wide, improved to press leader 900m out, weakened quickly home straight, tight of room 250m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊。九百米處上前追逼領放馬。直路上迅速轉弱，二百五十米處空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Made contact at start, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, there to turn, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 起步時發生觸碰，留居後列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Away with them, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 550M, showed limited response early in straight, crowded near 200M, eased final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。五百五十米處向外移出。直路初對催策反應平平。接近二百米處時受擠迫，最後一百五十米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 550M, 2-1/2L back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 250M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。自五百五十米處起走第三疊。入直路時落後兩個半馬位。直路上對催策反應甚佳。二百五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。末段衝刺強勁，以一馬頸位之先勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Fast into stride, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, hit the front approaching 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時挑戰領放馬。趨近三百米處時取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後五十米不敵首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。衝刺強勁，以一頸位之先掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Mid-field, pushed along on bend to hold position, headway when checked briefly 250m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。直路彎受推策以保持位置。追前，二百五十米處一度勒避。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Raced in touch with leaders out wide, pushed along wide into home straight, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 緊隨領先馬匹，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Out with rest, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, showed some response early in straight, no clear run near 250M, cleared 150M, made minor progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。四百五十米處向外移出。直路初對催策略有反應。接近二百五十米處時未能望空。一百五十米處望空。其後略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Wide throughout towards rear, driven 400m out, minimal headway and never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 居後列。沿途走外疊。四百米處受催策。末段略為追前，從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W3W) Settled midfield 2 wide, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Settled towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, made steady ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居後列。轉直路彎時向外移出。末段以穩勢追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, pushed along 500m out, challenged up rail from 200m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。五百米處受推策。自二百米處起沿內欄展開挑戰。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W1W) In rear after badly crowded exiting stalls, blocked off turning into home straight, unable to improve position.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘時嚴重受擠迫，其後居後列。轉入直路時受困。末段未能追前。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, closed off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。三百五十米處向外移出。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Slightly slow out, hampered shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘稍慢，其後不久受阻礙，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Not the quickest out, settled midfield 3 wide, closed off nicely to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 出閘並非最快，居中間位置，走第三疊。末段衝刺良佳，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Made contact at start, raced 3 wide better than midfield, difficult to settle, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。難以穩定走勢，大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速，末段保持穩勢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Heavily bumped out of stalls, ridden along to chase leader, dropped away quickly final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 出閘時被大力碰撞，受催策以追趕領放馬。三百米處迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 500M, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。自五百米處起走第三疊。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Taken back to race 3 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, very wide into straight, inconvenienced near 350M, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 留居後列，走第三疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位，走大外疊。接近三百五十米處時受妨礙。保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Jumped only fairly, reserved towards the rear on inside, 7Ls to make up 400M, made limited progress towards the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走內疊。四百米處落後七個馬位。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Held up after slow start, checked prior to halfway, outpaced and left behind final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘緩慢，留後。半程前勒避。最後二百五十米未能跟上步速及被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Settled in worse than midfield near the centre of the track, came under pressure onto course proper, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間之後位置，靠近跑道中央競跑。跑離分支直路時受催策，以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; In touch with leaders, couldn't keep up halfway, weakened to finish last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;緊隨領放馬匹，半程時未能跟上對手。轉弱，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Settled in mid-field, under pressure halfway, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置。半程時受催策。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, bumped near 1000M, wider on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。接近一千米處時發生碰撞。直路彎走較外疊。直路早段未能再增速。其後轉弱及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, soon headed top of home straight, dropped away quickly final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速領放。直路初瞬即被超越。最後二百五十米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Bumped on jumping, raced wide without cover in midfield, didn't find much when ridden along from 400M. Never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。自四百米處起受催策但無甚餘力。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Made running, struggled to hold the lead early in home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m, eased off.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑。直路早段難以保持領先位置。最後二百米迅速墮退，收慢。
